Custom duties, import taxes, and any other fees imposed by your country's customs authority are NOT included in the order total and are the sole responsibility of the buyer. Please contact your local customs authority to determine applicable fees before placing your order. If delivery fails due to unpaid customs charges and goods are returned to us, a restocking fee will apply.

home.heroTitle: Specialized Online Store For Tigo Energy Products
home.heroSubtitle: No markups. No surprises. Just direct access.
home.heroServing: Serving the entire solar community: Installers, Retailers, and Homeowners.
home.noProductsYet: No products available yet. Add products in the admin panel.
home.shopByCategorySubtitle: Find the right products for your solar project
home.logisticsP1: From our strategic hub in Slovenia, we connect the manufacturing excellence of Thailand and China directly to your doorstep. Merchandise arrives via the Port of Koper—the shortest route from Asia to Central Europe.
home.logisticsP2: This logistical advantage minimizes transit times and eliminates unnecessary middlemen. The result? We can distribute Tigo Energy products anywhere in the EU at the lowest possible price.
home.mapAlt: Tigo Energy EU Distribution Map - Slovenia Hub
home.whyChooseSubtitle: We make solar optimization simple and accessible
home.moreEnergyDesc: Module-level optimization ensures maximum power harvest from every panel, even in partial shade.
home.enhancedSafetyDesc: Rapid shutdown compliance and module-level monitoring for peace of mind.
home.smartMonitoringDesc: Real-time performance data for every module with the Tigo Energy Intelligence platform.
home.ctaTitle: Ready to Optimize Your Solar Installation?
home.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of installers and homeowners who trust Tigo for their solar optimization needs.

invoice.returnPolicy: Return Policy: We offer a 14-day return policy for all unused items in their original packaging. Please contact support@tigoenergy.com for return authorizations.
invoice.warranty: Warranty: All products listed on this invoice are covered by a 1-year standard limited warranty starting from the date of delivery.

invoice.thankYou: Thank you for choosing Tigo Energy. Sustainability is our mission.

verificationCode.title: Verify your email address
verificationCode.text: Thank you for joining Tigo Energy SHOP. To complete your registration and secure your account, please use the following verification code:
verificationCode.expire: This code will expire in 10 minutes. If you did not request this, please ignore this email.

verificationLink.title: Verify your email address
verificationLink.text: Welcome to Tigo Energy SHOP! Please click the button below to verify your email address and activate your account.
verificationLink.linkHelp: If the button above doesn't work, you can also copy and paste the following link into your browser:
verificationLink.ignore: If you did not create an account, no further action is required.

welcome.title: Welcome to the family!
welcome.text: We're thrilled to have you at Tigo Energy SHOP. You're now connected to Europe's specialized distributor for Tigo Energy solar solutions.
welcome.feature1Desc: Direct access to technical experts who know Tigo products inside out.
welcome.feature2Desc: Genuine products at the best possible prices, shipped directly across Europe.
welcome.feature3Desc: Manage your orders, tracking, and B2B benefits all from one profile.
welcome.footerNote: If you have any questions, our support team is just one message away.

messageSent.title: We've received your inquiry
messageSent.text: Thank you for reaching out to us. Your message has been successfully delivered to our support team. We've included a copy of your message below for your records.
messageSent.footerNote: A member of our team will review your inquiry and get back to you as soon as possible. We typically respond within one business day.

newMessage.title: You have a new message
newMessage.text: A team member has replied to your inquiry. You can view the message and continue the conversation in your store profile.
newMessage.footerNote: If you have any trouble logging in, please contact our support team.

orderConfirmation.title: Thanks for your order!
orderConfirmation.text: We've received your order and we're getting it ready. You'll receive another email when your order has been shipped.
orderConfirmation.footerNote: You can track your order status in your Account Profile.

orderPartial.title: Order Received
orderPartial.bannerText: Your order has been successfully received and partially paid. Because of the nature or size of your order, we are currently calculating the most accurate shipping cost for your location.
orderPartial.text: We will notify you via email as soon as the shipping price is set. Once confirmed, you will be able to fulfill the final payment in your store profile to complete the order.
orderPartial.footerNote: Thank you for your patience and for choosing Tigo Energy SHOP.

cartAbandonment.title: Did you forget something?
cartAbandonment.text: We noticed you left some items in your cart. We've saved them for you, so you can pick up exactly where you left off.
cartAbandonment.footerNote: Need help with your order? Just reply to this email and our team will be happy to assist you.

priceChange.title: Exciting price update!
priceChange.text: We thought you'd like to know that a product you previously purchased or showed interest in now has a new price.
priceChange.footerNote: This is a great time to expand your solar installation or stock up on components.

delivered.title: Delivered!
delivered.text: Great news! Your order #{{order_number}} has been successfully delivered. We hope you are happy with your new Tigo Energy products.
delivered.attachmentNote: You can download the following documents from your order page:
delivered.footerNote: Thank you for choosing Initra Energija as your Tigo Energy partner. If you have any questions about installation or product setup, our technical team is here to help.

b2bVerified.title: Your B2B Account is Active
b2bVerified.text: We are pleased to inform you that your VAT number (VIES) has been successfully verified. Your B2B account is now fully active, and you can enjoy all the benefits of our professional partner program.
b2bVerified.button: Log In to Your B2B Portal
b2bVerified.footerNote: Welcome aboard! We look forward to supporting your solar projects.

b2bApplication.title: B2B Account Created
b2bApplication.thankYou: Thank you for registering a B2B account with Tigo Energy SHOP. We are excited to have you on board!
b2bApplication.bannerText: Your B2B account is now active. You can start shopping immediately and enjoy B2B pricing and professional tools.
b2bApplication.text: Simply log in to your account to browse our full product range, access your B2B pricing, and place orders.
b2bApplication.footerNote: If you have any questions, feel free to reply to this email.

passwordReset.title: Reset your password
passwordReset.text: We received a request to reset your password for your Tigo Energy SHOP account. Please click the button below to choose a new password.
passwordReset.linkHelp: If the button above doesn't work, you can also copy and paste the following link into your browser:
passwordReset.expire: This link will expire in 1 hour. If you did not request a password reset, please ignore this email or contact support if you have concerns.

shippingUpdate.title: Your order is on the way!
shippingUpdate.text: Your order #{{order_number}} has been shipped and is now on its way to you.
shippingUpdate.footerNote: Please note that it may take up to 24 hours for the tracking information to update on the carrier's website.

returns.title: Returns & Warranty
returns.p14DayReturns: In accordance with EU consumer protection law, B2C customers may return unused items in their original packaging within 14 days of receipt for a full refund. Items must be in resalable condition. The buyer is responsible for return shipping costs unless the item is defective.
returns.pRestockingFee: A minimum restocking fee of 25% applies to all returned items received within 7 days of the return request. Returns received after 7 days are subject to a minimum restocking fee of 35%. All restocking fees are assessed at our sole discretion based on the condition of the returned goods and applicable circumstances.
returns.pB2BReturns: All sales to business (B2B) customers are final. Returns from B2B customers are accepted solely at the discretion of Initra Energija d.o.o. and are not guaranteed. If a return is accepted, restocking fees and any associated costs will be determined on a case-by-case basis. By placing an order as a B2B customer, you acknowledge and accept these terms.
returns.pNonEUReturns: Orders shipped outside the European Union are subject to customs duties, import taxes, and other fees imposed by the destination country's customs authority. These charges are NOT included in our prices and are the sole responsibility of the buyer. If delivery fails due to the buyer refusing to pay customs fees and the goods are returned to us, a restocking fee will apply in addition to all return shipping costs. We strongly recommend contacting your local customs authority before ordering to understand applicable fees.
returns.pWarranty: Tigo Energy products come with industry-leading manufacturer warranties (up to 25 years for MLPE components). Warranty claims must be made through Initra Energija d.o.o. and are subject to the manufacturer's warranty terms and conditions.

shipping.title: Shipping Information
shipping.pLead: We deliver Tigo Energy solutions across the European Union during business days.
shipping.pDeliveryTimes: Average delivery time is 2-4 business days depending on your location.
shipping.pCarriers: We primarily use GLS and DPD for standard shipments, and specialized freight for larger orders.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Your privacy is important to us. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal data when you use Tigo Energy SHOP.
privacy.p1: We collect information you provide during registration, such as your name, email, phone number, and address.
privacy.p2: We use your information to process orders, provide support, and improve our services.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By accessing and using Tigo Energy SHOP, you agree to be bound by these terms.
terms.p1: These terms govern your use of our website and services.
terms.p2: Permission is granted to temporarily download one copy of the materials on Tigo Energy SHOP's website for personal, non-commercial transitory viewing only.

impressum.title: Impressum
impressum.pAuthorized1: Initra Energija d.o.o. is an authorized distributor of Tigo Energy products in Europe. We specialize exclusively in Tigo Energy solutions, ensuring expert knowledge and authentic products.
impressum.pResponsible: Initra Energija d.o.o. is responsible for all content published on this website.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: This Cookie Policy explains how Tigo Energy SHOP uses cookies and similar technologies to recognize you when you visit our website.
cookies.p1: Cookies are small data files that are placed on your computer or mobile device when you visit a website.
cookies.p2: We use essential cookies for the website to function and optional cookies for analytics.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a2: Yes, our experts are available to help you with Tigo product selection and configuration.

contact.title: Contact Sales
contact.intro: Looking for volume pricing or have questions about your solar installation? Verify your email below to start a conversation with our sales team.

productSupport.title: Tigo Product Support
productSupport.intro: Get technical help with your Tigo Energy products via Shop Messenger

cookieConsent.title: We use cookies
cookieConsent.description: We use essential cookies to make our shop work. With your consent, we may also use analytics and marketing cookies. Read our
cookieConsent.essentialDesc: Required for the shop to function: session, cart, language preference. Cannot be disabled.
cookieConsent.analyticsDesc: Help us understand how visitors use the site so we can improve it.
cookieConsent.marketingDesc: Allow us to show you relevant advertising and measure campaign effectiveness.

gdpr.title: Your Data Rights (GDPR)
gdpr.description: Under GDPR, you have the right to access, export, and delete your personal data at any time.
